mapper.insert: INSERT INTO simple_review ( SIMPLE_REVIEW_NO, SIMPLE_REVIEW_MEMBER_ID, SIMPLE_REVIEW_TMDB_MOVIE_ID, SIMPLE_REVIEW_RATING, SIMPLE_REVIEW_CONTENT, SIMPLE_REVIEW_DATE ) VALUES ( simple_review_seq.NEXTVAL, #{simpleReviewMemberId}, #{simpleReviewTmdbMovieId}, #{simpleReviewRating}, #{simpleReviewContent}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT AVG(SIMPLE_REVIEW_RATING) FROM SIMPLE_REVIEW WHERE SIMPLE_REVIEW_TMDB_MOVIE_ID = #{tmdbMovieId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SIMPLE_REVIEW WHERE SIMPLE_REVIEW_TMDB_MOVIE_ID = #{tmdbMovieId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SIMPLE_REVIEW WHERE SIMPLE_REVIEW_TMDB_MOVIE_ID = #{movieId} AND SIMPLE_REVIEW_MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
select count(*) from simple_review where simple_review_tmdb_movie_id = #{tmdbMovieId}
select avg(simple_review_rating) from simple_review where simple_review_tmdb_movie_id = #{tmdbMovieId}
SELECT simple_review_rating as rating, COUNT(*) as count FROM simple_review WHERE simple_review_tmdb_movie_id = #{tmdbMovieId} GROUP BY simple_review_rating ORDER BY simple_review_rating

SELECT simple_review_no as simpleReviewNo, simple_review_member_id as simpleReviewMemberId, simple_review_tmdb_movie_id as simpleReviewTmdbMovieId, simple_review_rating as simpleReviewRating, simple_review_content as simpleReviewContent, simple_review_date as simpleReviewDate, (select member_nickname from member where member_id = simple_review_member_id) as memberNickname, (select member_profile_img from member where member_id = simple_review_member_id) as memberProfileImg FROM simple_review WHERE simple_review_tmdb_movie_id = #{movieId} ORDER BY simple_review_no DESC
